name: Git Workflow
description: Consistent git branching, commit, and pull request workflow for teams
author: skillforge

environment.name: git
environment.description: Git must be available on PATH

guardrails: Never force-push to main or master branches
Always confirm before destructive git operations (reset --hard, clean -f, branch -D)
Require explicit confirmation before pushing to remote
Never commit secrets, credentials, or .env files
